reviews.comment:
Muy muy muy muy muy antipáticos. Desganados. Burlones.Después de esta visita, casi dejo de ser socia. Nada que ver con otras oficinas de ACA que son más amables.

(Translated by Google)
Very, very, very, very unfriendly. Lackluster. Mocking. After this visit, I almost quit being a member. Nothing like other ACA offices that are friendlier.

reviews.comment:
Cargamos nafta de pasada y por una x razón no nos descontaron puntos de la tarjeta. Siendo domingo queríamos aprovechar la promo. El playero nos comento que en la tarjeta lo teníamos puntos, lo cual a mí me figuraba que tenía 2400 de hecho me sobraban. Tendrían que encontrar una solución a ese tipo de problemas para no fastidiar al cliente por un inconveniente interno. La atención de los tanto del shop como la de los playeros es muy buena.

(Translated by Google)
We stopped to fill up with gas and for some reason, they didn't deduct points from our card. Since it was Sunday, we wanted to take advantage of the promotion. The attendant told us we had points on our card, and mine showed I had 2400 points, which was more than enough. They should find a solution to these kinds of problems so they don't inconvenience customers due to an internal issue. The service from both the shop staff and the attendants is very good.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNBaC1iX1dREAE
